001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.controller;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueType;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.IssueTypeService;
005import java.util.List;
006import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
007import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
008import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
009import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
010import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
011
012/**
013 * REST controller exposing read-only access to issue types.
014 */
015@RestController
016@RequestMapping("/issue-types")
017public class IssueTypeController {
018
019  private final IssueTypeService service;
020
021  /**
022   * Creates a controller exposing read-only issue type operations.
023   *
024   * @param service issue type service.
025   */
026  @Autowired
027  public IssueTypeController(IssueTypeService service) {
028    this.service = service;
029  }
030
031  /**
032   * Returns all issue types.
033   *
034   * @return list of issue types.
035   */
036  @GetMapping(produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
037  public List<IssueType> getAllIssueTypes() {
038    return service.getAll();
039  }
040}
